on_try_use_move: # Use a separate volatile so that the move can only be used once, even if the Mon is immune to trapping.

on_hit_field: $side_conditions = [mist, lightscreen, reflect, spikes, safeguard, tailwind, toxicspikes, stealthrock, waterpledge, firepledge, grasspledge, stickyweb, autoraveil, luckychant, gmaxsteelsurge, gmaxcannonade, gmaxvinelash, gmaxwildfire, gmaxvolcalith]
